calendar.description: House Natural Resources, Agriculture, and Environment Hearing
Senate Natural Resources, Agriculture, and Environment Hearing

general_provisions: This bill creates a study related to wetlands.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>directs the Department of Natural Resources (department) to:<hr><ltbullet1>complete a study on wetlands in counties of the first or second class;<hr><ltbullet1>make recommendations for legislative and administrative action; and <hr><ltbullet1>report the study findings and recommendations to the Natural Resources, Agriculture, and Environment Interim Committee; <hr><ltbullet>restores a requirement that the department publish land use permits for wetlands collected by the Utah Geological Survey; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming changes.
